item.title: Designing a team of agents
item.snippet: A conceptual look at agent coordination, planner and executor roles, and system design tradeoffs for teams of agents.
item.content:
This conceptual article examines how a team of agents coordinates work and where planner and executor roles should separate.

## Coordination Model
Agent coordination and task delegation drive the system design.

## Planner and Executor Roles
Planner and executor responsibilities create different failure modes.

## Governance Layer
Permissions and guardrails are discussed as secondary concerns.

## Memory Boundaries
Long-term memory is mentioned as one architectural consideration.
